title: Share Update option for Board Update
excerpt:
Hello,

posts.author: GinaT (Gina Thorpe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

There are many people in my company who are not monday.com users nor will reliably view a board or dashboard. I would like to be able to share an update with them via email. The Share Update function is available under a Board Update, but is currently being reviewed and disabled.

There are very few ways to share information from a board or project without inviting guests or viewers. Please keep functionality to use email for this. Not every company or co-worker is going to login to another tool to review information.

Thanks,
Gina

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @GinaT ,
The Board Email Reports got you back with this case.
It’s the unique app that provides reports on item updates. The types of reports:
On a board/project level:

  1. New and updated tasks
  2. Status updates
  3. Budget, Costs, Revenue changes
  4. Timeline and deadline overdue
  5. Time Tracking changes

On an item/task level:

  • Updates by a specific employee
  • Updates mentioning a specific employee
  • Updates containing attachments
  • Status updates
  • Last updates

An example:

image1386×555 53 KB

The message in my inbox with xls-attachment where you can find updates details:

image395×499 21 KB

You can test the app and check if it works for you. I hope you’ll find it helpful.
